summary: Frontend E2E testing completed for GRS Global Lab Logistics application. All core features are working: login flow, dashboard, sidebar navigation, shipments page, jobs page, clients page, settings page, create dialogs, and logout. One minor data inconsistency found in dashboard stats.

minor.issue: total_clients returns 0 but Clients page shows 5 clients - data mismatch in dashboard stats calculation

issues: Header title shows 'Dashboard' even when on Clients/Jobs/Shipments pages - should update to current page name

action_items: Fix dashboard stats API - total_clients showing 0 but should show actual count (5 clients exist in database)
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard stats API at /api/dashboard/stats may have incorrect query for counting clients
Header title in dashboard layout shows 'Dashboard' text in top bar across all pages instead of current page name
seed_data_creation: None - used existing backend data (13 jobs, 5 clients)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All frontend pages and dialogs are functional. Backend API is stable. Login with admin@bashari.com/admin123. Dashboard shows: 13 Jobs, Total Value $4.4B, Fees $3,110. Jobs page shows wide table with all job data. Create Shipment/Job/Client dialogs all open and show correct form fields. Settings page shows user profile and 2FA options.
